message:
fix(widgets): prevent arithmetic overflow in list and scrollbar scroll_down

Replace unchecked addition with saturating_add in scroll operations
to prevent potential overflow on extreme input values:
- ListState::scroll_down: offset + lines → offset.saturating_add(lines)
- ListState::select_next: (i + 1).min(count - 1) → use saturating_sub
  for the upper bound to handle count == 0 safely
- ScrollbarState::scroll_down: position + lines → position.saturating_add(lines)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
